This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] fallback role w/ region with no label
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] aria 1.1 switch role w/ fallback to aria 1.0 checkbox role
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div[role=button] ignoring invalid foo role token
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] unknown[role=button] ignoring invalid foo role token
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] button ignoring single invalid role token
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] button ignoring multiple invalid role tokens
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div[role=button] ignoring invalid foo role token including punctuation-contaminated known link role
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div[role=button] ignoring invalid unicode diacritics etc on link and group role tokens
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div[role=button] ignoring tab char
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div[role=button] ignoring line break
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
[FAIL] div[role=button] ignoring braille whitespace char
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "TypeError: window.test_driver_internal.get_computed_role is not a function"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
